title: aconitum kirinense var. heterophyllum
intro: Aconitum kirinense var. heterophyllum, also known as the Kirin Monkshood or Yellow Monkshood, is a variety of flowering plant in the Aconitum genus, characterized by its unique, yellow or greenish-yellow flowers. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aconitum kirinense var. heterophyllum include its ability to relieve pain, reduce swelling, and improve the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant's roots and leaves are typically dried and then used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions, although caution is advised due to its potential toxicity.
